title: zosterophyllanthos ascera
side_effects: Zosterophyllanthos ascera can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal problems, allergic reactions, and skin irritation. In some cases, excessive consumption can lead to nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea, while others may experience headaches or dizziness. Improper use of the plant can also cause respiratory issues, such as bronchitis or asthma, in individuals with pre-existing conditions. Furthermore, using zosterophyllanthos ascera in combination with other medications can amplify these side effects and lead to more severe health complications.
